info.description: Authentication service for Go Microservices Redis Pub/Sub Boilerplate. Provides user registration, login, JWT token management, and admin user operations.
info.title: Auth Service API

get.description: Detailed health with dependency status (requires system auth)
List all users with pagination (admin only)
Get a specific user by ID (admin only)

delete.description: Delete a user (soft delete by default) (admin only)

get.description: Get activity logs with optional filtering
Get a paginated list of users
Get the currently authenticated user's profile

post.description: Refresh access token using refresh token
Register a new user with email and password

get.description: Returns 200 if service is running (for load balancers)
List products with pagination and filters

post.description: Create a new product with name, description, price, stock and category

get.description: Get a specific product by ID

delete.description: Delete a product (soft delete by default)

get.description: Returns 200 if service is ready to accept traffic

BearerAuth.description: Enter your bearer token in the format: Bearer {token}
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
